mapper.sql: comment_id, user_id, work_id, parent_comment_id, in_comment_id, comment_floor, comment_text, approval_status, is_delete, time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_comments (user_id, work_id, parent_comment_id, in_comment_id, comment_floor, comment_text, approval_status, is_delete, time) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{work_id}, #{parent_comment_id}, #{in_comment_id}, #{comment_floor}, #{comment_text}, #{approval_status}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_comments WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND is_delete = 0 AND approval_status = 10 ORDER BY comment_floor ASC,
comment_id ASC
comment_id DESC

SELECT
FROM tb_comments WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND is_delete = 0 AND approval_status = 10
SELECT comment_id FROM tb_comments WHERE in_comment_id = #{parentCommentId} AND comment_floor = 2 AND is_delete = 0
